news.summary: The Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, James (Josh) Wilson, is urging investors who experienced losses in Bakkt to reach out to him directly regarding their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Bakkt within the period from March 25, 2024, to March 17, 2025, and wish to explore potential courses of action, you are encouraged to contact him.
news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims on behalf of Bakkt Holdings investors. Securities Litigation Partner encourages affected investors to contact directly if purchased between March 25, 2024 and March 17, 2025.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Viatris to reach out to him to explore potential courses of action. news.headline: Investor alert: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of Viatris. Contact James Wilson if suffered losses in Viatris between August 8, 2024 and February 26, 2025.

news.summary: Visa has made a strategic investment in London-based startup BVNK, which focuses on stablecoin payment infrastructure. The investment from Visa Ventures is described as more than just capital and is seen as a partnership. BVNK's CEO highlights the potential of partnering with Visa to redefine business operations in the digital economy. Visa's head of products and partnerships mentions that stablecoins are becoming integral to global payment flows. BVNK recently closed a $50 million Series B funding round and is expanding into the United States. Visa has been increasing its involvement in the crypto space, allowing users to deposit and withdraw funds from Coinbase and introducing the Visa Tokenized Asset Platform. Visa's investment in BVNK showcases its interest in digital asset innovation and stablecoin technology.
news.headline: Visa invests undisclosed amount in London stablecoin startup BVNK, focusing on digital asset innovation and payments future.

news.summary: Visa has invested in BVNK, a London-based startup focusing on stablecoin payment infrastructure. BVNK announced the strategic investment from Visa through their Visa Ventures arm, calling it "more than capital" and a partnership. BVNK closed a $50 million Series B funding round at the end of 2024, led by Haun Ventures, and involving industry players like Coinbase Ventures and Tiger Global. BVNK, valued at about $750 million at the time, plans to expand into the United States. Visa emphasizes its involvement in the crypto space, allowing users to deposit and withdraw funds from Coinbase using eligible Visa debit cards. Visa has also launched the Visa Tokenized Asset Platform to streamline tokenized assets management. This partnership signifies Visa's interest in digital asset innovation and their commitment to exploring new technologies for their clients and partners.
news.headline: Visa invests in London startup BVNK's stablecoin payment platform, emphasizing digital asset innovation with $50 million funding.

news.summary: In San Angelo, Texas, on May 7, 2025, ICC – International Chemicals LLC, a subsidiary of SMC Global, introduced AvanScav 1450, an advanced hydrogen sulfide (H₂S) scavenger targeted at oilfield operators seeking high performance. The product aims to meet the needs of operators who value uncompromised effectiveness.
news.headline: ICC, a subsidiary of SMC Global, introduces AvanScav 1450, a safer H₂S scavenger for oilfields, enhancing performance.

news.summary: More than 700 professionals from the nonprofit sector are set to convene in San Antonio for the upcoming Raise 2025 event. Hosted by OneCause, a prominent provider of event and online fundraising solutions, the event will feature presentations and insights from top experts in the fundraising industry. The schedule and lineup of speakers for the event have been officially unveiled, promising attendees a valuable opportunity to learn from some of the brightest minds in the field.
news.headline: Raise 2025 event in San Antonio to gather 700+ nonprofit professionals, featuring top speakers on fundraising.

news.summary: In New York, global professional information provider Wolters Kluwer has shared survey results regarding Artificial Intelligence (AI) adoption in internal audit. The findings indicate that 39% of internal auditors currently utilize AI, with an additional 41% planning to implement AI within the next year. This data was revealed by Frans Klaassen, the Senior Vice President and General Manager of Wolters Kluwer Audit. The survey sheds light on the increasing interest and investment in AI technologies within the internal audit sector.
news.headline: Internal auditors aim to double AI adoption by 2026, with 39% currently using AI and 41% planning to adopt it in 12 months.

news.summary: In Boston today, GoNetspeed, the leading independent fiber optic network builder in the Northeast, revealed plans to allocate over $250 million for expanding fiber optic internet services across multiple Massachusetts communities. This significant investment marks the company's largest collective financial commitment yet. The initiative aims to provide at least 27 municipalities, such as Haverhill, Beverly, Salem, Quincy, Yarmouth, and Barnstable, with reliable access to cutting-edge infrastructure for long-term benefits.
news.headline: GoNetspeed plans $250M investment in MA to bring fiber optic internet to 27 communities, incl. Haverhill, Beverly, Salem, Quincy, and more.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, Geneseeq Technology Inc. announced a groundbreaking blood-based screening test for pancreatic cancer developed in partnership with top clinical institutions. This test has the potential to revolutionize early detection, saving countless lives by identifying the disease at a much earlier stage. The collaboration between Geneseeq Technology Inc. and these institutions has resulted in the creation of a cutting-edge screening tool that promises a significant impact on pancreatic cancer diagnosis. This innovation could provide hope for countless individuals at risk of the disease, offering them a better chance of survival through early detection.
news.headline: Geneseeq reveals new blood test for early pancreatic cancer detection, potentially saving lives.

news.summary: A cybersecurity research unit, Guardz, recently discovered a well-coordinated cyber campaign that involved utilizing outdated login methods to evade multi-factor authentication (MFA) security measures. The attackers focused on infiltrating cloud environments by trying to exploit basic authentication protocols. The discovery was made in Miami on May 7, 2025. Guardz is a prominent cybersecurity company that offers managed security services.
news.headline: Guardz found cyber attackers exploiting old login methods to breach cloud environments by bypassing MFA.

It is further segmented by application into Injectable Drugs, Oral Drugs, Topical Drugs, and Inhaled Drugs. The global market for Corticosteroid APIs is witnessing significant growth with a focus on these specific segments.
news.headline: Corticosteroid API market set to grow at 6% CAGR through 2031 with various segmented types and applications.

news.summary: Economist Craig Shapiro suggests that China could use "geopolitical game theory" to avoid trade talks with the U.S. by selling its U.S. holdings, such as stocks and bonds. This move could potentially force the U.S. administration to retract tariffs without any negotiations. Shapiro believes that President Trump is sensitive to changes in risk asset prices, which could be influenced by a mass selling of assets by China. The expert advises China to proceed with selling its U.S. holdings to apply pressure on Trump and potentially eliminate tariffs by the weekend. Shapiro's insights are detailed in a post on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: China could manipulate US trade talks by selling its holdings, forcing the U.S. to retract tariffs. Economist Craig Shapiro suggests this strategy could pressure Trump, as U.S. stocks and bonds sales could trigger price fluctuation. China's move could make tariffs disappear without concessions.

This deal was finalized on May 3, 2025, solidifying GHR Healthcare's position in the industry.

news.summary: In light of the increasing shortage of oral health professionals nationwide, Planet Smilez in Newark, New Jersey has announced plans to establish a program to cultivate future providers in the field. The initiative aims to address this issue by offering early exposure, hands-on learning opportunities, and mentorship to students from educationally disadvantaged backgrounds. This program is set to benefit a significant number of aspiring oral health professionals and contribute to addressing the pressing need for more dental care providers.
news.headline: Planet Smilez is addressing the national shortage of oral health professionals by providing early exposure, hands-on learning, and mentorship for students.

news.summary: In State College, Pennsylvania, on May 7, 2025, it was highlighted that the majority of drowning incidents do not exhibit the expected signs of distress such as screaming or flailing. Rather, it is described as a silent battle that can easily go unnoticed in under 30 seconds. In order to increase awareness and mitigate the risk of such tragedies, aquatic safety specialist Dr. Tom Griffiths has emphasized the urgency of understanding these silent struggles.
news.headline: New app in State College helps parents spot drowning danger within 30 seconds, raising awareness and preventing tragedy.

news.summary: Inlyte Energy, based in San Leandro, California, unveiled a groundbreaking achievement on May 7, 2025. The company introduced a new generation battery that is safe, domestically manufactured, and operates without the use of lithium. This next-generation battery offers efficient cycling and provides seamless backup for multiple days. The innovative iron-sodium battery technology marks a significant advancement in the industry.
news.headline: Inlyte Energy achieves efficiency milestone with iron-sodium battery ahead of utility demo. Safe & domestically produced.

news.summary: In Bridgewater, New Jersey, iconectiv conducted a session at Connect (X) 2025 focusing on the increasing opportunities for tower companies in the competitive 5G landscape. Telecom CSPs are rapidly expanding their networks, presenting chances for tower companies to thrive. To stand out in this crowded market, companies need to effectively differentiate themselves. Juan Carlos (J.C.) Ortiz led the session, emphasizing the need for a common language to accelerate the expansion of 5G networks. This event highlighted the potential for growth and collaboration in the industry.
news.headline: iconectiv will discuss tower companies seizing opportunities in the 5G landscape at Connect (X) event.

news.headline: Mizuho Americas hires Lloyd Walmsley as MD and Senior Equity Research Analyst for Internet sector in Atlanta.

news.summary: Natera (NASDAQ: NTRA) will release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, 2025-05-08 with analysts expecting an EPS of $-0.66. Past performance shows mixed results with Q4 2024 missing estimates, resulting in a 1.0% price drop, while Q3 saw a 19.0% increase in share price. Analysts rate Natera as Outperform, with an average one-year price target of $194.86, suggesting a potential 25.31% increase in the stock price.
